features.featureTitle: Enrich the meta title and meta description in frontend/index.html with an expanded set of geo-targeted keywords covering VERDIER COUVERTURE's service area: Pierrelaye, Cergy, Pontoise, Saint-Ouen-l'Aumône, Conflans-Sainte-Honorine, Herblay, Taverny, Ermont, Argenteuil, Osny, Jouy-le-Moutier, Vauréal, Neuville-sur-Oise, Méry-sur-Oise, Eaubonne, Sannois, Franconville, Cormeilles-en-Parisis, Montigny-lès-Cormeilles, L'Isle-Adam, Beaumont-sur-Oise, Persan, Saint-Leu-la-Forêt, Bouffémont, Domont, Sarcelles, Garges-lès-Gonesse, Val-d'Oise (95), and Île-de-France. Keywords must also cover services: couvreur, toiture, réfection, réparation, pose de tuiles, zinguerie, isolation, nettoyage toiture, traitement toiture, couvreur urgence, couvreur pas cher.

Add a dedicated hidden-but-indexable SEO keyword section (visually minimal, styled with small muted text or integrated as a 'zones d'intervention' section) in the page — either in the Footer or as a new section between Contact and Footer — listing all served cities and towns: Pierrelaye, Cergy, Pontoise, Saint-Ouen-l'Aumône, Conflans-Sainte-Honorine, Herblay, Taverny, Ermont, Argenteuil, Osny, Jouy-le-Moutier, Vauréal, Neuville-sur-Oise, Méry-sur-Oise, Eaubonne, Sannois, Franconville, Cormeilles-en-Parisis, Montigny-lès-Cormeilles, L'Isle-Adam, Beaumont-sur-Oise, Persan, Saint-Leu-la-Forêt, Bouffémont, Domont, Sarcelles, Garges-lès-Gonesse, Val-d'Oise (95), Île-de-France. Present them as 'Zones d'intervention' using proper H2/H3 heading and a responsive tag-cloud or grid layout consistent with the existing earthy roofing theme.

Update the text content of the Hero section (frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx), About section (frontend/src/components/About.tsx), and Contact section (frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx) to naturally weave in geo-targeted keywords referencing neighboring cities. For example, the Hero subtitle should mention 'Pierrelaye, Cergy, Pontoise et toute la région Val-d'Oise'; the About section should mention the intervention area; the Contact section should reinforce 'couvreur disponible sur Cergy, Argenteuil, Conflans, Herblay et environs'.

Update the JSON-LD LocalBusiness structured data block in frontend/index.html to add an 'areaServed' property as an array of City objects covering all neighboring municipalities: Pierrelaye, Cergy, Pontoise, Saint-Ouen-l'Aumône, Conflans-Sainte-Honorine, Herblay, Taverny, Ermont, Argenteuil, Osny, Jouy-le-Moutier, Vauréal, Neuville-sur-Oise, Méry-sur-Oise, Eaubonne, Sannois, Franconville, Cormeilles-en-Parisis, Montigny-lès-Cormeilles, L'Isle-Adam, Beaumont-sur-Oise, Persan, Saint-Leu-la-Forêt, Bouffémont, Domont, Sarcelles, Garges-lès-Gonesse. Also add a 'knowsAbout' array listing the main roofing services as keywords.
